name: io.github.mova-compact/mova-flat-runner
description: Governed AI workflows with human approval gates and audit trails for Claude and MCP clients.

environmentVariables.name: MOVA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: MOVA API key. Use test-key-001 to get started without registration.

environmentVariables.name: LLM_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenRouter API key (sk-or-v1-...). Required for LLM analysis steps.

environmentVariables.name: LLM_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: OpenRouter model ID for analysis steps.

environmentVariables.name: MOVA_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the MOVA API base URL.
